title: Senior Software Engineer - DXC Technology India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - DXC Technology India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DXC Technology India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About DXC Technology India:
DXC Technology India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India!
